audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a medium pitch and a moderate speaking rate, accompanied by a sigh and a shout.
temporal_description: A man with long, dark hair and a dark, layered outfit stands in the foreground, facing forward with his right arm extended outward and his left hand slightly raised. Behind him, a group of people in dark, rugged clothing stand in a semi-circle, mostly facing forward, with some partially obscured by shadows. The scene shifts to a young man in a patterned sweater and collared shirt standing in a dimly lit stone corridor, looking straight ahead. The final shot shows a vast crowd gathered in a dark, forested area, with a single figure standing in the center, facing them. The crowd is densely packed and mostly motionless, with the figure in the center appearing to address them.
